ideation: This animation sequence portrays a robot playfully interacting with a soft-serve ice cream cone.  The sequence starts with both arms at the sides, then one arm reaches out to gently grasp the cone, bringing it closer to the face. The robot then takes a 'lick' by tilting its head and subtly moving its arm to mimic the action. Finally, the arm returns the cone to its original position. The other arm remains fairly neutral to keep the focus on the ice cream interaction. This sequence is designed to convey a sense of playful enjoyment and delight.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready for a treat
left arm reaches out to grasp the cone gently
the cone is brought closer, tilting head for a lick
a playful lick, savoring the sweet moment
